title: Ingots
description: If you don't like the Coal and Redstone, check out the other version
body:
![Ingots_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/280e77453a50973feeb5ff83d2a61901bb7c800b.png)
You may see resource packs that changes the ores to ingots. But they are not look ok or they dont have any detail. But in this pack, ingots looks so nice and lot detaild like so:
![Ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/942119abc7a381ec00535ac2027e1d02c42686ea.gif)
**WAIT WAIT WAIT WAIT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!**
**WAIT WAIT WAIT WAIT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!**
**WAIT WAIT WAIT WAIT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!**

If you dont like the animation or you think the Coal and Redstone doesn't make any sense at all, check out the other versions just above.
